cleavage agent: the sample was digested using either trypsin (catalog #V5111, Promega)
collision energy: set at full scan with collision energy of 30 and 19 eV in positive mode
instrument: coupled to a Q Exactive Orbitrap Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: Heated electrospray ionization (HESI) was used as the method of ionization
labeling: Our labeled proteomics (iTRAQ) revealed that these four groups
reduction reagent: denatured and reduced with 6 m urea and 10 mm dithiothreitol
